scene.message: A cold wind blows in{nl} from beyond the door.{waitkey}{ret}
Go to the Demon Mountain?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Yukino: A creepy door.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: That door feels like{nl} a demon might pop out...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Do we still have{nl} business here?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The wise man keeps{nl} clear of danger.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The wise man keeps{nl} clear of danger.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Not that it matters,{nl} but they look pale.{waitkey}They should get more iron.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: No one's here.{nl} Let's try another room.{waitkey}{ret}
Show the "Mirror Frame"?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Yukino: Well, fine, but{nl} let's check it now and then.{waitkey}{ret}
